programme.title: Lakshmi Nivas
programme.desc: S1 E109 Lakshmi abandons her affluent roots to build a selfless life with Shriniwas. Decades on, the couple work tirelessly to secure their own house and fund a grand wedding for their daughter.

programme.title: Vasudha
programme.desc: S1 E548 Though they have different perspectives, the amiable and endearing Vasudha works as a housekeeper in Chandrika, a business tycoon's house.

programme.title: Jaane Anjaane Hum Mile
programme.desc: S1 E297 Raghav's heroic save injures him while Unnati's forgery causes strife. Later, as the ruse unravels, Raghav chastises Unnati for her deceit.

programme.title: Ganga Mai Ki Betiyaan
programme.desc: S1 E218 After her husband abandons her for not giving birth to a son, a resilient Ganga Mai dedicates herself to raising her three daughters with unwavering strength, grace, and affection.

programme.title: Saru
programme.desc: S1 E353 A kabaddi player with aspirations of becoming a district commissioner leaves Rajasthan for Mumbai to attend college, balancing her ambitions while fighting for her mother's rightful family status.

programme.title: Lakshmi Nivas
programme.desc: S1 E110 Lakshmi abandons her affluent roots to build a selfless life with Shriniwas. Decades on, the couple work tirelessly to secure their own house and fund a grand wedding for their daughter.

programme.title: Tum Se Tum Tak
programme.desc: S1 E298 A young woman's unexpected bond with a much older businessman brings emotional twists while challenging societal expectations and family ideals.

programme.title: Vasudha
programme.desc: S1 E549 Though they have different perspectives, the amiable and endearing Vasudha works as a housekeeper in Chandrika, a business tycoon's house.

programme.title: Jagadhatri
programme.desc: S1 E173 Unbeknownst to her family, a young woman leads a double life as an undercover intelligence officer, determined to clear her mother's name.

programme.title: Jaane Anjaane Hum Mile
programme.desc: S1 E502 Reet, a career-oriented woman, finds it difficult to deal with the societal pressures of marriage alongside navigating her life as a journalist.

programme.title: Tum Se Tum Tak
programme.desc: S1 E298 A young woman's unexpected bond with a much older businessman brings emotional twists while challenging societal expectations and family ideals.

programme.desc: Highlights from the finals match between England and India in the NatWest Series, where the two professional cricket teams compete against each other for victory.

programme.title: Best of Crime Patrol - Crime Patrol Satark
programme.desc: S1 E205 A compilation of the best cases investigated in 'Crime Patrol' showcases people from different walks of life falling victim to the vices of others or their own.

programme.title: Best of Crime Patrol - Crime Patrol Dial 100
programme.desc: S1 E1025 Crime Patrol episodes demonstrate the stringent application of the law against criminal activities, highlighting the severe penalties imposed on offenders.

programme.title: Best of Crime Patrol - Crime Patrol Dial 100
programme.desc: S1 E561 A compilation of some of the most spine-chilling cases from 'Crime Patrol Dial 100', which investigates murders, kidnappings and thefts among other heinous crimes.

programme.title: Indian Idol
programme.desc: S16 E53 Various talented participants from India compete against each other during a singing competition in order to impress the judges and win the title.

programme.title: Indian Idol
programme.desc: S16 E54 Various talented participants from India compete against each other during a singing competition in order to impress the judges and win the title.

programme.title: India's Got Talent
programme.desc: S11 E1 The judges are left impressed by the singing prowess of the three Italian women. Later, Joel Kaden comes up with a thrilling stunt, leaving the judges speechless.

programme.title: Best of Crime Patrol
programme.desc: S1 E847 A compilation of the best cases investigated in 'Crime Patrol' showcases people from different walks of life falling victim to the vices of others or their own.

programme.title: Ghum Hai Kisikey Pyaar Meiin
programme.desc: Virat is an IPS officer who loves Pakhi deeply. However, things become complicated when he has to let go of his love, Pakhi, and marry Sai.

programme.title: Maana Ke Hum Yaar Nahi
programme.desc: Khushi, everyone's favourite, unwittingly connects with conman Krishna through a wrong number, sparking an unexpected journey of love and adventure.

programme.title: Sampoorna
programme.desc: Mitti Kapoor Malhotra navigates personal and familial challenges as allegations against her husband test trust, love, and the pursuit of justice.

programme.title: Advocate Anjali Awasthi
programme.desc: Anjali Awasthi is a lawyer that struggles to achieve recognition in her field. But this desire to be recognised leads her to take on a challenging case that could help her achieve her dreams.

programme.title: Udne Ki Aasha
programme.desc: Though they get off to a bad start, an aspirational Saili and an unmotivated Sachin end up getting married. Saili then tries to turn her husband into a competent person.

programme.title: To Be Announced
programme.desc: This is TV Show - Entertainment Category.

programme.title: Anupamaa
programme.desc: Anupamaa, who parts with her ambitions and goals in a bid to raise her family, feels dejected when she fails to get any credit for her sacrifices and trials. She then decides to live on her own terms.

programme.title: Kyunki Saas Bhi Kabhi Bahu Thi
programme.desc: Tulsi and Mihir Virani navigate the ensuing challenges that emerge in their family which has endured a lengthy passage of time.

programme.title: To Be Announced

programme.desc: Khushi, everyone's favourite, unwittingly connects with conman Krishna through a wrong number, sparking an unexpected journey of love and adventure.

programme.desc: A bank robbery mix-up entwines three individuals in a crackbrained cat-and-mouse game.

programme.desc: Kishen returns love-struck from a trip and loses his everything to an evil look-alike.

programme.desc: Inspector Amar must unite two rival crime bosses to fight terrorism.

programme.desc: Gokuldham Society is full of quirky people who laugh and fight through every challenge.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Taarak narrates his kidnapping incident and mentions that Jethalals letter saved him.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: After meeting the society members, the guests request them to gather in the Club House.

programme.title: Gatha Shiv Parivaar Ki Ganesh Kartikey
programme.desc: Lord Kartikeya begs Mata Kali to end her destruction and shed her terrifying form.

programme.title: Gatha Shiv Parivaar Ki Ganesh Kartikey
programme.desc: The gods continue their battle, while Ganesha tries to stop it with a trick.

programme.title: Gatha Shiv Parivaar Ki Ganesh Kartikey
programme.desc: Tarakasur gathers the asura forces for a grand offensive against the devatas.

programme.title: Gatha Shiv Parivaar Ki Ganesh Kartikey
programme.desc: Chaos erupts in the heavens as Tarakasur kidnaps Devasena; Devtas and the Asuras fight.

programme.title: Gatha Shiv Parivaar Ki Ganesh Kartikey
programme.desc: The battle reaches its peak as Lord Kartikeya seeks to shatter Tarakasurs illusions.

programme.title: Gatha Shiv Parivaar Ki Ganesh Kartikey
programme.desc: Mata Chandi fights Nagasur, while Lord Kartikeyas conflict with Tarakasur persists.

programme.title: Maddam Sir
programme.desc: After chasing the wrong person, Karishma discovers that it is Misris doing as she has planted a mic on Santoshs uniform to eavesdrop on their plan. Watch ahead as Karishma starts calling.

programme.title: Maddam Sir
programme.desc: Inspector Bulbul Pandey arrives with a complaint against Haseena and Karishma.

programme.title: Maddam Sir
programme.desc: Tension rises as Haseena and Karishma refuse to hand over a case to Bulbul Pandey.

programme.title: Maddam Sir
programme.desc: Karishma and Haseena challenge Bulbul to a match of tug of war.

programme.title: Maddam Sir
programme.desc: Bulbul Pandey is incredibly pleased when he gets a public apology from Haseena.

programme.title: Maddam Sir
programme.desc: Karishmas senior tasks her with the responsibility of busting an illegal betting racket.

programme.title: Maddam Sir
programme.desc: Haseena offers to help nab Musa, but Karishma vehemently turns her down.

programme.title: Pushpa Impossible
programme.desc: Pushpa Patel, an endearing mother of three, faces lifes challenges with resilience and courage.

programme.title: Pushpa Impossible
programme.desc: Pushpa is accused of bribing a clerk which leads to her permits temporary revocation.

programme.title: Pushpa Impossible
programme.desc: Shanaya has found a way to deflect the accusation of stealing money from Ashwinis wallet.

programme.title: Pushpa Impossible
programme.desc: Shanaya formulates a fresh strategy to irritate Pushpa by utilising Ansh and Titli.

programme.title: Pushpa Impossible
programme.desc: Shanaya makes Ansh crush some chillies, causing him to get hospitalised.
